comment: "One-handed knot tying is an essential skill for surgeons, especially in situations where space is limited or when one hand is needed to maintain tension. However, whether one-handed or two-handed techniques are more advantageous depends on speed and security."
"The demonstration and description was simple and easy to understand."
"The video tutorial was in great detail without any rush."
"The speed was quite on time and I liked the fact that everything said was transcripted."
